Work

Portfolio Projects

Power BI · Sales

Regional Sales Overview Dashboard

Revenue tracking, pipeline analysis, and territory performance across 3 interactive tabs

Tab 1 — Sales Overview
Tab 2 — Win/Loss Overview
Tab 3 — Pipeline Trends
Problem: The sales team lacked a unified view of revenue across territories and product lines. Forecasting relied on manual spreadsheets with no scenario planning capability.

Key features

KPI cards — Revenue Won ($14.82M), Pipeline, Win/Loss %, Forecast
Revenue by Sales Stage funnel (Qualify → Close)
Win/Loss Ratio by Opportunity Owner with manager drill-down
Smart Narrative — auto-generated closing % insights
Pipeline by Top Industries stream chart (43 industries)
Territory heatmap — Revenue Open by Product & Region
Drill-through table — Account, Stage, Discount, Value
What-If slider for dynamic forecast scenario planning
Power BIDAXPower QuerySQL
Result: Sales managers gained real-time visibility across all territories. The What-If slider enabled instant scenario planning during executive reviews. Win/Loss breakdown identified specific reps for targeted sales training.
Power BI · Finance

Financial Reports Dashboard — Income Statement & Balance Sheet

Consolidated financial reporting with budget vs actuals analysis, variance tracking, and month-by-month trends across 2 tabs

Tab 1 — Income Statement (YTD / MTD)
Tab 2 — Balance Sheet (YTD / MTD)
Problem: Finance teams at manufacturing companies often struggle to consolidate P&L, balance sheet, and expense data into a single coherent view. Monthly reporting was manual, time-consuming, and lacked dynamic period switching or budget comparison.

Key features

Income Statement with Net Sales, Gross Profit, SG&A, Operating Profit
Budget vs Actuals variance columns (vs PY and vs Budget)
YTD / MTD toggle — switch period with one click
Income Statement Decomposition — PY vs YTD visual breakdown
Balance Sheet — Assets, Liabilities, Equity with begin/budget/result
Cash Conversion Cycle, Inventory NOD, Payables NOD tracking
Working Capital & Loans Payable vs Budget by Month charts
Filter Panel — Business Unit, Fiscal Year, Fiscal Month slicers
Power BIDAXPower QuerySQLM Code
Result: Finance managers got a single consolidated view of P&L and balance sheet performance with instant period switching. Budget variance is visible at a glance — no more manual Excel consolidation each month.
Power BI · Healthcare

Laboratory Turnaround Time Dashboard

SLA monitoring & bottleneck detection across a multi-stage testing pipeline

Problem: The client had no visibility into delays across lab testing stages. SLA breaches were discovered too late, with no way to pinpoint which region or step was underperforming.

Key features

SLA compliance tracking with color-coded alerts
Actual vs planned TAT per pipeline stage (custom DAX)
Regional breakdown to surface location bottlenecks
Drill-through to individual order-level records
Overdue order highlighting across all stages
Automated data refresh — zero manual effort
Power BISQLPower QueryDAX
Result: Operations team gained a clear view of pipeline performance. SLA breaches caught early, bottlenecks traceable to exact stage and region, manual reporting eliminated.

Visualization

Power BI Desktop & Service, custom visuals, drill-through, bookmarks, mobile layouts, row-level security

Analytics & DAX

Domains

Healthcare & laboratory, sales analytics, financial reporting (P&L, Balance Sheet), manufacturing
